title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
